arts.sum: Former Light Blues defender Graham Roberts has voiced his concerns about Clement's leadership

arts.ttl: ‘Probably’: Troy Deeney says ‘unbelievable’ Man Utd player would really fit in at Tottenham
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford’s Manchester United future appears to be up in the air right now. Manchester United haven’t made a decision on selling Rashford just yet,...

arts.ttl: Tottenham urged to SACK Ange Postecoglou and hire Premier League rival by former star
arts.sum: Jamie O'Hara wants Spurs to recruit the Brentford boss Thomas Frank to replace Ange Postecoglou, because he reckons the Aussie manager lacks game management skills

arts.ttl: Richarlison's personal news prompts Tottenham response ahead of Rangers clash
arts.sum: Spurs confirmed last month the striker had sustained a'significant hamstring injury' and would be sidelined 'long-term' after having only returned from a two-month absence following a groin issue. Tottenham have suffered significantly with injuries this term and currently have Richarlison, Guglielmo Vicario and Wilson Odobert as long-term injury issues.

arts.ttl: Spurs team Postecoglou to pick vs Rangers with Bissouma and Van de Ven calls
arts.sum: Guest's team: Forster; Porro, Dragusin, Gray, Udogie; Bentancur, Bergvall, Maddison; Kulusevski, Solanke, Werner. That means Archie Gray starts the Rangers game at centre-back alongside Radu Dragusin, with Pedro Porro and Destiny Udogie as full-backs.

arts.ttl: Radu Dragusin ready for Rangers crowd and issues promise to Tottenham teenager
arts.sum: Thursday night's Battle of Britain has the added spice of former Celtic boss Postecoglou returning to Glasgow with Tottenham - and Radu Dragusin is excited about facing Rangers

arts.ttl: Contact made to sign 27-year-old from Tottenham – Seen as a dream deal, Spurs strife a bonus
arts.sum: Fluminense want to sign Tottenham Hotspur’s Richarlison in the winter market. That’s according to Globo Esporte, who state the Brazilian club have identified the forward as the prime target to ‘increase the level’ of their attack. The Tottenham player was at Fluminense for 18 months and left them for Watford in the summer of 2017. arts.ttl: Rangers can pounce on Ange's 'gross naivety' as Tottenham boss warned 'you can't get away with this'
arts.sum: Postecoglou's Spurs face Rangers at Ibrox tonight having won just one of their last seven games in all competitions

arts.ttl: Rangers vs Tottenham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Rangers welcome Tottenham Hotspur to Ibrox his evening in a ‘Battle of Britain’ Europa League clash. The two teams are level on points in the standings, with Rangers above Spurs on goal difference heading into Thursday’s tie. A heavy home defeat to Lyon aside, Philippe Clement’s side have impressed in Europe this season.
